name_en: 👄FENDI New Sunshine Leather Mini Handbag, embossed with FENDI ROMA lettering and a tortoiseshell-effect hard organic glass handle, equipped with a lined interior compartment, accented with matching leather trim and gold hardware, featuring two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, allowing for both hand and shoulder carry. Model: FD8051, Dimensions: 13*6.5*18cm
